transcript: Speaker A: I worked in company two years handling many works. Idi correct aa? [Is this correct?] Speaker B: Nenu oka company-lo rendu samvatsaralu panichesanu. Mariyu nenu chala panulanu nirvahinchanu. [I worked in a company for two years and managed many tasks.] I worked in a company for two years and I have handled many tasks. Speaker A: Very good. Speaker C: Hi, nenu ippude meeru English nerchukovadam chusanu. Actually naa English kuda chala weak, app nundi English nerchukovacha? [Hi, I just saw you learning English. Actually my English is also weak, can I learn English from this app?] Speaker A: Naa English kuda weak ga undi, anduke daily nenu SpeakX app lo English practice chestunanu. [My English is also weak, that's why I practice English daily on the SpeakX app.] Speaker C: SpeakX app? Adenti? [SpeakX app? What is that?] Speaker A: Idi oka AI English teaching app. Ikkada AI teachers neeku English practice chepinchi English ela matladalo nerpistaru. [This is an AI English teaching app. Here AI teachers make you practice and teach you how to speak English.] Speaker C: Kani deeniki chala time padutundi kada? [But doesn't this take a lot of time?] Speaker A: Ledu, roz ki 15-20 minutes practice cheste chalu, 15 to 20 days lo meeru English fluent ga matladataru. [No, practicing 15-20 minutes daily is enough to speak fluent English in 15 to 20 days.] Speaker C: Kani idi chala costly ga kuda untundi kada? [But isn't this very costly?] Speaker A: Assalu kaadu, rojuki 4 rupees matrame, 7 days trial kuda teeskovachu. [Not at all, it's only 4 rupees a day, and you can get a 7-day trial.] Speaker C: Idi naku mundre enduku teliyaledu, nenu ippude SpeakX app download chestanu. Thank you. [Why didn't I know this earlier, I will download the SpeakX app right now. Thank you.]

summary: A woman practices English using the SpeakX app, where an AI teacher corrects her grammar in real-time. A man in a cafe notices her and asks about the app, expressing concern about his own weak English, the time commitment, and the cost. She explains that the AI-powered app offers non-judgmental practice for just 15-20 minutes a day, guarantees fluency in 15-20 days, and costs only 4 rupees per day with a 7-day trial, prompting him to download it immediately.
